summary: Tested Weekly Intelligence Report feature (Phase 5 Enhancement). All 21 backend tests passed (100%). All 8 endpoints working correctly with proper report structure containing all required sections.

generate_weekly_report.details: Generates report for current week or specific week_start. Supports force=true to regenerate.

get_current_report.details: Returns current week's report. Creates if not exists.

get_by_week.details: Returns report by year/week. Returns 404 for non-existent weeks.

get_by_id.details: Returns report by ID (format: wir_YYYY_wWW). Returns 404 for non-existent.

get_recent_reports.details: Returns recent reports sorted by week descending. Supports limit parameter.

update_reflection.details: Updates PersonalReflection section. Accepts full or partial updates.

mark_complete.details: Sets is_complete=true. Returns 404 for non-existent reports.

report_structure_verified.performance_snapshot: total_trades, wins, losses, scratches, win_rate, total_pnl, total_r, avg_r_per_trade, profit_factor, best_day, best_day_pnl, worst_day, worst_day_pnl, avg_win, avg_loss, largest_win, largest_loss, win_rate_change, pnl_change
report_structure_verified.top_contexts: List[ContextInsight] - empty when no qualified contexts
report_structure_verified.struggling_contexts: List[ContextInsight] - empty when no qualified contexts
report_structure_verified.edge_alerts: List[EdgeAlert] - empty when no decaying edges
report_structure_verified.calibration_suggestions: List[CalibrationSuggestion] - empty when no trade data
report_structure_verified.confirmation_insights: List[ConfirmationInsight] - empty when no significant confirmations
report_structure_verified.playbook_focus: List[PlaybookFocus] - empty when no qualified playbooks
report_structure_verified.reflection: PersonalReflection with what_went_well, what_to_improve, key_lessons, goals_for_next_week, mood_rating (1-5), confidence_rating (1-5), notes

critical_code_review_comments: All sections return empty lists when no trade data - expected behavior as stated in requirements
Report ID format wir_YYYY_wWW is correctly implemented
MongoDB _id properly excluded from all responses
seed_data_creation: 3 test reports created: wir_2026_w11, wir_2025_w3, wir_2025_w2
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weekly Intelligence Report endpoints tested at /api/journal/weekly-report/*. All 8 endpoints working. Report sections (performance, top_contexts, struggling_contexts, edge_alerts, calibration_suggestions, confirmation_insights, playbook_focus, reflection) are all present but return empty/default values due to no trade data in database. Service integrates with all 5 Medium Learning services via init_weekly_report_service(). Data persists correctly in MongoDB weekly_intelligence_reports collection.
